'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 40''' was the fortieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 2]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé]] meets [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]
*[[IG-series/Legends|IG Assassin Droids]]
*[[Sun Crusher]] including the [[Resonance torpedo]]
*[[Shieldship]]
